title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: mysql-selinux bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for mysql-selinux is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: SELinux policy modules for MySQL and MariaDB packages.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RFE: fixup for SELinux rules for upstream MariaDB and upstream MySQL packages [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104203)

full_text:
An update for mysql-selinux is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

SELinux policy modules for MySQL and MariaDB packages.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): RFE: fixup for SELinux rules for upstream MariaDB and upstream MySQL packages [rhel-8.10.z] (JIRA:RHEL-104203)
